title: A Cup In His Hand

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A G D F#m)
We give You thanks, O Lord of might,
Your wondrous deeds, Your guiding light.
Your name resounds across the skies,
In You, the righteous glorify.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: When storms arise, You still the waves,
Our hearts are calm, our souls are saved.
The earth may tremble, kingdoms fall,
But You are steadfast through it all.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Justice flows like rivers wide,
Your hand, a force, our hearts abide.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (A E F#m D)
You lift the lowly, You break the proud,
Your voice is thunder, fierce and loud.
A cup of wrath, the nations pour,
Yet the righteous sing forevermore.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The wicked boast of fleeting power,
Their strength dissolves in judgment’s hour.
You set the pillars of the earth,
Your justice reigns, of matchless worth.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: **Guitar solo**

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Justice flows like rivers wide,
Your hand, a force, our hearts abide.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You lift the lowly, You break the proud,
Your voice is thunder, fierce and loud.
A cup of wrath, the nations pour,
Yet the righteous sing forevermore.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Forevermore, forevermore,
Your justice stands, unshaken, sure.

epigraph: For in the hand of the LORD there is a cup
styleNote: Soaring Electric Guitar W · Atmospheric Guitars Swell · Repeated With Heightened Energy
